testCases.input:
bridge = QuantumBridge(3)
data = {'returns': [0.1, -0.05, 0.15]}
result = bridge.prepare_quantum_input(data)

exercises.title: Talent Gap Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze and plan for talent gaps

testCases.input:
planner = TalentPlanner()
planner.add_gap(SkillGap('quantum', 3, 1, 0.9))
analysis = planner.gap_analysis()
analysis['quantum']['gap'] == 2
